attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY                   REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
 REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,-999) NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE REV_TRX
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SOL_END_CUST_REV_RETRO_P    END_CUST
 ON  (END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
 AND (REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT BETWEEN -1001800 and -1000000
 OR REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT BETWEEN -1006800 and -1005000
 OR REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT BETWEEN -1011800 and -1010000)
 AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD= 'AR'
 AND (CASE WHEN REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END)<>  END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON REV_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 ON REV_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
 AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR  (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) 
 )/*ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/ /*OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 AND  NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
  AND REV_TRX.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 
 AND REV_TRX.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD NOT IN ('Accrual Revenue')/*ADDED TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
 AND REV_TRX.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0 /*ADDED TO RESTRICT RESIDUALS*/
 UNION 
 SELECT
 REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY                   REVENUE_KEY ,
 REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(NSO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,-999) NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE REV_TRX   
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SO_END_CUST_REV_RETRO_P    NSO_END_CUST
 ON   (CASE WHEN REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999
 WHEN REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888
 WHEN REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777 
 ELSE REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY END) = NSO_END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND (REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  BETWEEN -1001800 and -1000000 
 OR REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 and -1005000
 OR REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1011800 and -1010000)
 AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD= 'AR'
 AND (CASE WHEN REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END)<> NSO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON REV_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 ON REV_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
 AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR  (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS') )/*OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
)/*ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */ 
  AND REV_TRX.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0
 AND REV_TRX.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD NOT IN ('Accrual Revenue')/*ADDED TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
 AND REV_TRX.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0 /*ADDED TO RESTRICT RESIDUALS*/

SELECT
REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
  ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
  ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
  ,REV_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   
  ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,REV_TRX.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,END_CUST.NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY     AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY                       
  ,REV_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
  ,REV_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
  ,REV_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
  ,REV_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
  ,REV_TRX.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
  ,REV_TRX.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
  ,REV_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
  ,REV_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
  ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
  ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
  ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
  ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
  ,REV_TRX.DD_GL_DATETIME                
  ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
  ,REV_TRX.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
  ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
  ,REV_TRX.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
  ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
  ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
  ,REV_TRX.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
  ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
  ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
  ,REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
  ,REV_TRX.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
  ,REV_TRX.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
  ,REV_TRX.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
  ,REV_TRX.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
  ,REV_TRX.DV_MISC_FLG                   
  ,REV_TRX.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
  ,REV_TRX.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
  ,REV_TRX.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
  ,REV_TRX.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
  ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
  ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
  ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
  ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               
  ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
  ,REV_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
  ,REV_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
  ,REV_TRX.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
  ,REV_TRX.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
  ,CAST (REV_TRX.GL_DT  AS DATE)  
  ,REV_TRX.BK_SS_CD                        
  ,REV_TRX.DV_EXTENDED_QTY                  
  ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
  ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
  ,REV_TRX.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
  ,REV_TRX.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD           
  ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
  ,REV_TRX.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
  ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_DT
  ,REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM
  ,REV_TRX.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY  
  ,REV_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY 
  ,REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
  ,REV_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
  ,REV_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY               
  ,REV_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                
  ,REV_TRX.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID
  ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
  ,'I' AS ACTION_CODE                   
  ,'I' AS DML_TYPE                      
  ,REV_TRX.DV_FMV_FLG /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF FMV Q1FY15*/
  ,REV_TRX.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  ,REV_TRX.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,            /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  REV_TRX.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  ,  /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  REV_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,                  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  REV_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,       /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  REV_TRX.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,   /* pneelraj : Added as part of ICPM Q2FY16 */
  REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,   /*  Added as part of Q1FY17,CE-CHINA */
  REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT, /*  Added as part of Q1FY17,CE-CHINA */
  REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT, /*  Added as part of Q1FY17,CE-CHINA */
  REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,  /*  Added as part of Q1FY17,CE-CHINA */
 COALESCE(REV_TRX.XCAT_FLG,'N'), /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 COALESCE( REV_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, 'Others' ) , /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 COALESCE(REV_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N' ) ,  /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */   
 COALESCE(REV_TRX.ELA_FLG,'N' )   /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */ 
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
,REV_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD,
 REV_TRX.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG , /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
 REV_TRX.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
 ,REV_TRX.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
 ,REV_TRX.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD     /*ACCRUALS CHANGES JAN18*/
 ,REV_TRX.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY29 MERAKI */ 
 ,REV_TRX.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF RSDL CHANGES Q1FY20*/
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/ 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
 ,REV_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,REV_TRX.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,REV_TRX.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,REV_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,REV_TRX.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,REV_TRX.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 ,REV_TRX.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_AR_P END_CUST, 
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE REV_TRX
  WHERE REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=END_CUST.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND END_CUST.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
  AND END_CUST.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT

SELECT
 REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY                   REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
 REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(END_CUST.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY ,-999) NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE REV_TRX
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON REV_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   /*Changed DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FOR VALID KEY DERIVATION FOR ATTRIBUTED RECORDS*/
 INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SOL_END_CUST_REV_RETRO_P_XAAS    END_CUST
 ON NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY=END_CUST.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  
  AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD= 'AR' AND NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY>0   /*Filtering XAAS & ICMS_XAAS Trx */
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*TSV ACRLS CHANGE JAN18*/ 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY  /*Filtering XAAS & ICMS_XAAS Trx */
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  /*Filtering XAAS & ICMS_XAAS Trx */
 AND (CASE WHEN REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END)<>  END_CUST.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY
 /*WHERE  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS', 'ICMS-XAAS')*//*Filtering XAAS & ICMS_XAAS Trx */
 WHERE  (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%', 'ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )/*OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/ 
 AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N' AND REV_TRX.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 AND REV_TRX.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD NOT IN ('Accrual Revenue') 
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC TO DERIVE END_CUSTOMER INFORMATION FOR TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
 UNION ALL
  SELECT
  REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY                   REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
  REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
  REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(END_CUST.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY ,-999) NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE REV_TRX
  INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SOL_END_CUST_REV_RETRO_P_XAAS    END_CUST
  ON REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=END_CUST.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON REV_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD= 'AR' AND REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0  
  AND (CASE WHEN REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END)<>  END_CUST.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY
  WHERE (REV_TRX.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0 OR NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' OR REV_TRX.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD IN ('Accrual Revenue'))

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,XCAT_FLG                      
,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,ELA_FLG                       
,NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,NEW_ELA_FLG  
,'N' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD 
,'Y' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD                
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_AR MAPFLG 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_AR CMN
WHERE CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = MAPFLG.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = MAPFLG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = MAPFLG.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)

SELECT
 REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       /*  added as part of april9th2017 */      
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG   /*  added as part of april9th2017 */         
,GL.ELA_FLG   /*  added as part of april9th2017 */                     
/* ,NSO.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */  
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
 ,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
 WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='AR'
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_AR_P' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_AR' )
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2
 UNION 
 SELECT
 REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,GL.ELA_FLG                       
/* ,NP.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */  
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
 WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='AR'
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
 AND NP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_AR_P' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_AR')
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2

SELECT 
 GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,GL.ELA_FLG                       
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
  ,CASE WHEN  NOTV.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN  ALLOC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ELSE  COALESCE(OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') END AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,COALESCE(OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG 
 ,CASE WHEN GL.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN NOTV.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN  ALLOC_ENT.ELA_FLG ELSE COALESCE(OMAP.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS NEW_ELA_FLG
       
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SOL_OFFER_ATTR_GL_AR_RO NSOAT 
ON  NSOAT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP ALLOC_ENT                       
ON ALLOC_ENT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = NSOAT.ENTERPRISE_SKU_KEY                        
AND ALLOC_ENT.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = 'STANDALONE'    

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE NOTV
ON  ALLOC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME=NOTV. BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME  
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
 ON  GL.PRODUCT_KEY = OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY= OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD 
 
 WHERE GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='AR'
 AND    NSO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME IN (SELECT BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_CSCC_SO_SRC_NAME WHERE ACTIVE_IND='Y')

 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0 
 AND OMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_AR_P' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_AR_CSCC')
 AND  
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_AR_CSCC CMN
 WHERE CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 AND CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 )                  
AND
(
GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <>NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
 OR GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 OR GL.ELA_FLG <> NEW_ELA_FLG
 )
AND 1=2

SELECT 
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END  AS NEW_ELA_FLG          
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
ON  GL.PRODUCT_KEY = OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY= OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD 

 /*MAY21 CSCC*/
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
  ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

WHERE GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='AR'
 AND    NSO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN (SELECT BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_CSCC_SO_SRC_NAME WHERE ACTIVE_IND='Y')
  /*MAY21 CSCC*/
  AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
  AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND OMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_AR_P' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_AR')
AND ( GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <>OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
OR GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
OR GL.ELA_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END)
)
AND 1=2
